CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOVE CLEANERS ALEXANDER, ALBERT HENAGER, LATHAN D POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,117.02 DAMAGES, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $415.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,382.02, COST INCLUDES $126.00 INTEREST & $289.00 COST; LEASE EQUIPMENT IS ONE IPSO MODEL #WE234/4HSMP HI-SPEED, MICRO VALUED AT $2,500.00/SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-20-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
